headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://accounts.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://www.islamicnames.in; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-src https://accounts.google.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.islamicnames.in; upgrade-insecure-requests;
